ham.subject: Out of Office: Rahul Sharma
ham.body:
Hi team,

I am currently out of the office with limited access to email from 5th April to 12th April. I will return on 13th April and reply to your emails as soon as possible.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague, Priyanka Patel at priya@example.com.

Thank you.

Best,
Rahul

spam.subject: URGENT: Missed Delivery Fee – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Aapke recent shipment with FedEx (Tracking #123456789) deliver nahi hua because of outstanding delivery fee. Please pay $45.00 within 48 ghante by clicking <URL>. Agar aap pay nahi karte, to shipment return ho jayega aur aapka account suspend ho sakta hai.

For any queries, contact us at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
FedEx Delivery Team
